headline: TD Cowen Highlights Block Inc. (XYZ) AI Strategy Gains
summary: Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) ranks among the best fintech stocks to buy as digital payments volume surges. On June 23, TD Cowen reiterated its Buy rating and $101 price target for Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ). The firm’s evaluation came after investor discussions with Block in Montreal and during the TD Cowen 2026 US Corporate Access Day in […]
